channel.title: Dashboards on Portal de Patógenos Chile
channel.description: Recent content in Dashboards on Portal de Patógenos Chile

item.title: Dashboards developed by international data services and resources
Dashboards developed by the Portal Node or its user community
item.description:
Under this section, dashboards developed by local user communities using software components developed by the Pathogens Data Network project.

For example, see SARS-CoV-2 variants dashboard in the Swedish pathogens portal.
